network_quality.description_tips: Continuously evaluates your network's responsiveness, latency and DNS, and flags connection drops or packet loss in real time.
network_quality.overall_score_tips: Overall Score = Response Score × 60% + Reliable Score × 40%
network_quality.speedtest_placeholder: Speed test is reserved and will be implemented later.
network_quality.disable_tips: Stops continuous monitoring of network responsiveness, latency and DNS, and disables real-time alerts for packet loss and connection drops. Do you want to continue?
network_quality.internet_target_tips: Used to probe internet connectivity and measure end-to-end latency (Hop2 ping target).
network_quality.dns_target_tips: The domain resolved during DNS lookup probes. Both A (IPv4) and AAAA (IPv6) records are queried.
network_quality.invalid_probe_target_tips: Please enter a valid domain name.
network_quality.speedtest_tips: The current function is a local speed test for the router and is subject to rate limiting rules from features such as SQM and QoS.
network_quality.rate_total_netnat_tips: Enabling the {network} feature may affect speed accuracy.
